description: Pie chart of North Carolina schools by 2023 School Performance Grade, with slices labeled directly: C is the largest share at 38 percent, then D (27.6), B (19.9), F (7.5), and A (7.0).

title.text: Share of schools by performance grade, 2023
title.subtitle: Pie charts are fine for part-to-whole with five slices or fewer. Order the slices and label them directly.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI sample school data, SY2019–2023. Style-guide demo.
